<div id="stoplight">

<div style="height: 100%;">

<div id="mosaic-provider-react-aria-0-1" style="height: 100%;">

<div overlay-container="true" style="height: 100%;">

<div class="sl-elements sl-antialiased sl-h-full sl-text-base sl-font-ui sl-text-body">

<div class="sl-elements-api sl-flex sl-inset-0 sl-h-full">

<div class="sl-flex" style="max-width: 450px;">

<div class="sl-flex sl-overflow-y-auto sl-flex-col sl-sticky sl-inset-y-0 sl-pt-8 sl-bg-canvas-100 sl-border-r"
style="padding-left: calc(50% - 900px); width: 300px; min-width: 300px;">

<div class="sl-flex sl-items-center sl-mb-5 sl-ml-4">

#### anagrafiche

</div>

<div class="sl-flex sl-overflow-y-auto sl-flex-col sl-flex-grow sl-flex-shrink">

<div class="sl-overflow-y-auto sl-w-full sl-bg-canvas-100">

<div class="sl-my-3">

class="ElementsTableOfContentsItem sl-block sl-no-underline"></a>

class="sl-flex sl-items-center sl-h-md sl-pr-4 sl-pl-4 sl-bg-primary-tint sl-cursor-pointer sl-select-none"
title="Overview">

</div>

<div class="sl-flex sl-items-center sl-text-xs">

</div>

title="Stato API">

src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="svg-inline--fa fa-bullseye sl-icon" />

style="width:1em" />

title="Soggetto delegato">

class="svg-inline--fa fa-chevron-right fa-fw sl-icon sl-text-muted"

style="width: 1em; flex-basis: 6px; cursor: ew-resize;">

</div>

<div class="sl-overflow-y-auto sl-flex-1 sl-w-full sl-px-24 sl-bg-canvas">

<div class="sl-py-16" style="max-width: 1500px;">

<div class="HttpService sl-mb-10">

<div class="sl-flex sl-justify-between sl-items-center">

<div class="sl-relative">

# anagrafiche

</div>

<div>

<div class="sl-text-xs sl--mr-0.5 sl-ml-1">

src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="svg-inline--fa fa-chevron-down fa-fw sl-icon"
style="width:1em" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="sl-relative sl-mb-5">

<span class="sl-badge sl-max-w-full sl-h-xs sl-text-paragraph-tiny sl-whitespace-nowrap sl-px-1.5 sl-py-0.5 sl-bg-canvas-100 sl-text-paragraph sl-rounded-full sl-border-input sl-border-0"
style="background-color: rgb(41, 55, 66); color: rgb(255, 255, 255);"></span>

<div class="sl-flex sl-justify-items-start sl-items-center sl-w-full">

<div class="sl-flex sl-overflow-x-hidden sl-flex-shrink">

<div class="sl-overflow-x-hidden sl-w-auto sl-truncate sl-whitespace-nowrap">

v1.0.20250911-802

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="sl-stack sl-stack--vertical sl-stack--6 sl-flex sl-flex-col sl-items-stretch">

<div class="sl-panel sl-outline-none BaseURLContent sl-inverted sl-w-full sl-rounded-lg"
test="servers">

<div class="sl-panel__titlebar sl-flex sl-items-center sl-relative focus:sl-z-10 sl-text-base sl-leading-none sl-whitespace-nowrap sl-pr-4 sl-pl-4 sl-bg-canvas-200 sl-text-body sl-border-input focus:sl-border-primary sl-select-none">

<div class="sl-flex sl-flex-1 sl-items-center sl-h-lg">

API Base URL

</div>

</div>

<div class="sl-panel__content-wrapper sl-bg-canvas-100">

<div class="sl-flex sl-flex-col sl-w-full sl-p-4">

<div class="sl-stack sl-stack--vertical sl-stack--1 sl-flex sl-flex-col sl-items-stretch">

<div class="sl-panel sl-outline-none ServerInfo sl-w-full"
test="server-row">

<div class="sl-panel__titlebar sl-flex sl-items-center sl-relative focus:sl-z-10 sl-text-base sl-leading-none sl-whitespace-nowrap sl-pr-4 sl-pl-4 sl-bg-canvas-200 sl-text-body sl-border-input focus:sl-border-primary sl-select-none">

<div class="sl-flex sl-flex-1 sl-items-center sl-h-lg">

<span class="sl-font-bold sl-pr-2 sl-pl-0">Production:</span><span class="sl-whitespace-normal sl-py-2"
aria-label="Production"
style="word-break: break-word;"><span class="sl-font-normal">https://api.rentri.gov.it/anagrafiche/v1.0</span></span>

</div>

</div>

<div class="sl-panel__content-wrapper sl-bg-canvas-100">

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div test="security">

<div class="sl-panel sl-outline-none sl-w-full sl-rounded-lg"
test="security-row">

<div class="sl-panel__titlebar sl-flex sl-items-center sl-relative focus:sl-z-10 sl-text-base sl-leading-none sl-pr-4 sl-pl-4 sl-bg-canvas-300 sl-text-body sl-border-input focus:sl-border-primary sl-select-none">

<div class="sl-flex sl-flex-1 sl-items-center sl-h-lg">

<span role="heading">Security</span>

</div>

</div>

<div class="sl-panel__content-wrapper sl-bg-canvas-100">

<div class="sl-panel__content sl-p-0">

<div test="http-service-security-row">

<div class="sl-panel sl-outline-none sl-relative sl-w-full">

<div class="sl-panel__titlebar sl-flex sl-items-center sl-relative focus:sl-z-10 sl-text-base sl-leading-none sl-pr-4 sl-pl-4 sl-bg-canvas-200 sl-text-body sl-border-input focus:sl-border-primary sl-select-none">

<div class="sl-flex sl-flex-1 sl-items-center sl-h-lg">

<span role="heading">Bearer Auth</span>

</div>

</div>

<div class="sl-panel__content-wrapper sl-bg-canvas-100">

<div class="sl-panel__content sl-p-4">

<div>

<div class="sl-m-2 sl-p-2 sl-border">

<div class="sl-prose sl-markdown-viewer" style="font-size: 12px;">

Bearer JWT

Provide your bearer token in the Authorization header when making
requests to protected resources.

Example: `Authorization: Bearer 123`

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div test="additional-info">

<div class="sl-panel sl-outline-none sl-relative sl-w-full sl-rounded-lg">

<div class="sl-panel__titlebar sl-flex sl-items-center sl-relative focus:sl-z-10 sl-text-base sl-leading-none sl-pr-4 sl-pl-4 sl-bg-canvas-300 sl-text-body sl-border-input focus:sl-border-primary sl-select-none">

<div class="sl-flex sl-flex-1 sl-items-center sl-h-lg">

<span role="heading">Additional Information</span>

</div>

</div>

<div class="sl-panel__content-wrapper sl-bg-canvas-100">

<div class="sl-panel__content sl-p-0">

<div class="sl-panel__content sl-p-4">

<div class="sl-prose sl-markdown-viewer" style="font-size: 12px;">

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="sl-prose sl-markdown-viewer sl-my-5">

Servizio Anagrafica RENTRI

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>
